_notes: Populate IDs after running subscriptions:audit-pricing-trust and subscriptions:invariant-check on prod-snapshot. Each category's IDs become repeatable test fixtures. Each entry is an object: {"type": "quran|academic|course", "id": <int>, "note": "<short description>"}. The importer (subscriptions:import-prod-fixtures) reads this file, pulls those rows from the prod_snapshot DB connection (configured per docs/subscription-prod-observation-runbook.md), sanitises PII, and inserts into the local DB. Never commit real prod sub IDs to this repo without product-owner sign-off; treat these IDs as low-risk because the importer sanitises PII, but the policy is still: keep this list to the minimum needed for repeatable bug reproduction.
